seoTitle: Cumbo vs Cumborah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cumbo and Cumborah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cumbo and Cumborah.
heading: Cumbo vs Cumborah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cumbo, New South Wales and Cumborah, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cumborah has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Cumbo (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cumbo or Cumborah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cumbo has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Cumborah scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cumbo scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Cumborah scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cumbo or Cumborah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cumborah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
